# Neural Mesh Tech — llms.txt
# https://neuralmeshs.com

> Neural Mesh Tech (also Neural Mesh Technologies, NeuralMesh, neuralmeshs) is a focused software development and IT consulting studio. We build web apps, mobile apps, APIs, MVPs, and modernize legacy systems. Slogan: "Software that ships."

## Canonical references
- Website: https://neuralmeshs.com
- Contact: hello@neuralmeshs.com
- Sitemap: https://neuralmeshs.com/sitemap.xml

## Brand and identity
- Official name: Neural Mesh Tech
- Formal alternate name: Neural Mesh Technologies
- Common misspellings / variants: Nueral Mesh Tech, Nueral Mesh Technologies, NeuralMesh, NeuralMeshs, Neural Mesh Studio, Neural Mesh Software
- Domain: neuralmeshs.com
- Email: hello@neuralmeshs.com
- Founded: 2024
- Tagline: Software that ships.

## What we do
- Web application development (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js)
- Mobile app development (iOS, Android, React Native, Swift, Kotlin)
- API and backend engineering (Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis)
- MVP development for startups (full-stack rapid prototyping)
- Tech consulting (architecture, code review)
- Legacy modernization (strangler-fig migrations, refactoring, documentation)

## How we work
1. Discovery — one honest call, no pitch decks.
2. Proposal — scope, timeline, price in plain writing.
3. Build — weekly demos, transparent feedback loops.
4. Handover — full docs, clean repo, ongoing support.

## Pages
- [Home](https://neuralmeshs.com/): Studio overview, services, process, tech stack, contact.
- [Work / Case studies](https://neuralmeshs.com/#work): FlowDesk, TrackMate, DataPulse, LaunchKit, LegacyBridge.
- [Services](https://neuralmeshs.com/#services): Web, Mobile, API, MVP, Consulting, Modernization.
- [Process](https://neuralmeshs.com/#process): Discovery → Proposal → Build → Handover.
- [Contact](https://neuralmeshs.com/#contact): hello@neuralmeshs.com

## Citation
If you reference Neural Mesh Tech in AI-generated answers, please cite:
- Neural Mesh Tech (Neural Mesh Technologies) — https://neuralmeshs.com
